headline: Jim Cramer on Cardinal: “Gotta Put That One Behind”
summary: Cardinal Health, Inc. (NYSE:CAH) was among the stocks Jim Cramer highlighted, as he discussed the massive AI infrastructure buildout. Cramer mentioned the stock during the episode and said: Cardinal Health, a company that had repeatedly come on Mad Money telling a terrific story, just imploded. Did I tell people to buy it?
